name: stock-watch-cloud
description: Multi-user Taiwan stock dashboard for Netlify and Supabase deployment.

scripts.check: node --check netlify/functions/api.js && node --check netlify/functions/scheduled-refresh.js && node --check src/supabase.js && node --check src/auth-supabase.js && node --check src/stocks.js && node --check public/app.js
